description: The IT Director has requested three custom dashboard views in ManageEngine OpManager to support different operational teams. Create three new dashboard tabs with the exact names: (1) 'NOC-Live-Operations', (2) 'Capacity-Planning-View', and (3) 'Executive-KPI-Board'. For each dashboard, you MUST add at least one widget of your choice so that they are functional views rather than empty placeholders. You can find the dashboard creation options on the main OpManager dashboard interface. Access the application at http://localhost:8060 using credentials admin/Admin@123.
